title: Qodly Saved Conditions
description: JSON schema for saved_conditions.json — reusable conditional visibility rules for Qodly components. Conditions evaluate datasource values and can be combined with AND/OR logic. Located at Project/Sources/Shared/saved_conditions.json.

conditions.description: Array of top-level condition definitions. Each can be a simple datasource check or a combination (AND/OR) of nested conditions.

Condition.description: A condition node. Two types: 'datasource' (leaf — evaluates a single datasource path) or 'combination' (branch — groups conditions with AND/OR).

type.description: Condition type: 'datasource' for leaf comparisons, 'combination' for AND/OR groups.

name.description: Human-readable label for this condition (used in Qodly Studio UI).

DatasourceCondition.description: Leaf condition that evaluates a single datasource path against a value using a comparison operator.

value.description: Comparison value. For hardcoded: a literal string. For datasource: a datasource path (e.g. 'shared:user.fullName').

valueType.description: How to interpret the value field.

dsType.description: Data type of the datasource being evaluated (string, number, date, bool, long, entity, etc.).

dataType.description: Alternate data type hint (used alongside dsType in some conditions).

low.description: Alternate operator field (legacy/variant — same role as 'op').

CombinationCondition.description: Branch condition that groups nested conditions with a logical operator.

op.description: Logical operator to combine nested conditions.

conditions.description: Nested conditions (can be datasource or combination — supports arbitrary depth).
